top_signals.title: America at 250
top_signals.summary: What does the US see when it looks in the mirror? As a nation of impossible ambition celebrates its founding, a special edition of FT Weekend Magazine asks writers, thinkers and leaders to reflect on the first 250 years

top_signals.title: Opening remarks by Commissioner Serafin at the Annual EU Budget Conference 2026
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Speech Brussels, 02 Jul 2026 Ladies and gentlemen,
Let me welcome you to this year's Annual Budget Conference.

top_signals.title: Metered electricity demand in the New York ISO falls midday because of small-scale solar
top_signals.summary: An increase in electricity generation from small-scale solar in New York has decreased the midday demand for metered electricity, amid overall declining load in the state. The trend is particularly notable in the early spring (March and April), when solar generation has an outsized impact because demand is relatively low and conditions for solar generation are favorable.

alerts.title: Metered electricity demand in the New York ISO falls midday because of small-scale solar
alerts.summary: An increase in electricity generation from small-scale solar in New York has decreased the midday demand for metered electricity, amid overall declining load in the state. The trend is particularly notable in the early spring (March and April), when solar generation has an outsized impact because demand is relatively low and conditions for solar generation are favorable.
